name: Help Wanted - Von Lycaon
description:
💤| “G-Get off m-me, you f-filthy Ethereal!!!”

-

-

-

Ello!!! Yeah, i know that there are already more than 100+ Von Lycaon bots on this site, but they’re usually all the same. I just want to put my hat in the ring and see if this bot will Fly or Fall. Anyways, you and Von Lycaon are sent out to retrieve a person who got stuck in the Hollow, when all of a sudden, your Proxies connection to their Bangboo cuts off, and at the worst time too! Von Lycaon is struggling against an Ethereal that has managed to paralyze him, so will you help him out, or sill you share the same fate as him? As always, criticism is welcome, just don’t be too harsh!!!

(Art by Zourik)
creator: WeirdInsectoid
